The '''Republican Army''' was a ground force of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] that took part in the [[Battle of Mandalore (pre-Naboo)|Battle of Mandalore]] that occurred before the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] came into existence. Members of the army wore gray uniforms, and were likely a branch of, or nickname for the [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Republic Judicial Forces]]. Though many [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] helped this army, it was led by regular military officers. Members of the Republican Army were sent to deal with [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Vrox]] of [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] when it was discovered that he had sent small but potent [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] forces to attack neighboring [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] as well as that he was possibly producing illegal [[Battle droid/Legends|war droids]]. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces managed to restore order to the planet by capturing Vrox and very nearly wiping out the Mandalorian raiding forces.
